description_long: A male security guard is depicted in a tan uniform with short sleeves, standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides. The uniform features a gold badge on the left chest, security patches on both upper sleeves, and a black utility belt equipped with various items. The guard has short brown hair and a serious facial expression, wearing black shoes and tan pants that match the shirt. The utility belt includes visible pouches and equipment, suggesting readiness for duty. The overall appearance is professional and standardized, suitable for urban environments such as malls, parking lots, or office complexes.
description: A male security guard in a tan uniform with patches, a badge, and a black utility belt, standing with arms outstretched. The attire is professional and equipped for urban security duties.
description_view_0: Front view showing the guard's face, badge, chest details, and full utility belt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the arm patch, side profile of the face, and belt equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, uniform, and the full length of the utility belt.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right arm patch, side profile, and belt equipment.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a standardized tan short-sleeve shirt and matching pants, both featuring security insignia patches on the upper sleeves and a gold badge on the left chest. The uniform is complemented by a black utility belt with attached equipment and black shoes. The style is formal and professional, with no hat or tie present, and the shirt is buttoned up. The overall appearance is consistent with private security personnel in urban settings.
attribute_security_insignia: patch on left sleeve (green and gold)
patch on right sleeve (green and gold)
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms fully extended horizontally to the sides, displaying a formal and alert demeanor.
